DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF RBS CITIZENS N.A.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED; WITHIN 20 DAYS OF THE DATE OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER ON DEFENDANT RICHARD DARRIAU OR HIS COUNSEL, DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE RESPONSES (WITHOUT OBJECTIONS) TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. THE COURT FURTHER AWARDS MONETARY SANCTIONS OF $289.00 AGAINST DEFENDANT RICHARD DARRIAU PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTIONS 2023.010 AND 2023.030 PAYABLE WITHIN 30 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THE COURT'S ORDER ON DEFENDANT OR HIS COUNSEL. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: SANFORD KINGSLEY. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-23-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Matters Admitted; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Bruce Dannemeyer
Off Calendar Apr-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RBS CITIZENS N.A.'S Motion To Deem Matters Admitted is GRANTED; the Court orders that the genuineness of all documents and the truth of all matters specified in Plaintiff's Requests for Admission, dated October 29, 2014, are deemed admitted. The Court further awards monetary sanctions of $425.75 against Defendant Richard Darriau pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 2033.280(c) payable within 30 days of service of the Court's order on Defendant or his counsel. The prevailing party is to prepare an order.

Judge Pro Tem: Sanford Kingsley. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Form Interroagatories; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Bruce Dannemeyer
Off Calendar Apr-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RBS CITIZENS N.A.'S Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories is GRANTED; within 20 days of the date of service of this order on Defendant Richard Darriau or his counsel, Defendant shall serve written verified answers (without objections) to Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories. The Court further awards monetary sanctions of $289.00 against Defendant Richard Darriau pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure sections 2023.010 and 2023.030 payable within 30 days of service of the Court's order on Defendant or his counsel. The prevailing party is to prepare an order.

Judge Pro Tem: Sanford Kingsley. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Demand For Production Of Douments; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Bruce Dannemeyer
Off Calendar Apr-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RBS CITIZENS N.A.'S Motion To Compel Response To Demand For Production Of Documents is GRANTED; within 20 days of the date of service of this order on Defendant Richard Darriau or his counsel, Defendant shall serve responses (without objections) to Plaintiff's Request for Production of Documents. The Court further awards monetary sanctions of $289.00 against Defendant Richard Darriau pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure sections 2023.010 and 2023.030 payable within 30 days of service of the Court's order on Defendant or his counsel. The prevailing party is to prepare an order.

Judge Pro Tem: Sanford Kingsley. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
